name: Ghorayebah (Bracelets of the Queen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cream the butter until it looks almost white.
3. Gradually add the sugar and beat until the mixture is very smooth and very creamy.
4. Add the flour gradually, forming a dough; knead by hand as more flour is added. The dough remains soft. If too soft to handle, add a bit more flour.
5. Roll pieces about 5 inches long and 1/2 inch thick. Press ends together to form bracelets.
6. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
7. Sprinkle with chopped pistachio nuts.
8. Bake for about 25 minutes, watching carefully to ensure they do not brown at all. Slight browning spoils the characteristic taste.
